pages.text:
Raychem Screened, Separable Surge Arrester RSTI-SA-10 up to 41 kV
Product Features: The screened gapless surge arrester is The active part is a metal oxide
•Tested in accordance with a “T“-shaped product. It is designed arrester which meets the requirements
IEC60099-4 (May 2004) for direct connection onto outer cone of IEC-60099-4 for separable and
•State of art - gapless design bushings in accordance to EN50180 or dead-front arresters.
•Excellent protection margins EN50181 with interface type “C” or for
•Low residual voltages parallel connection mating to the rear The combination of screened
•Excellent short circuit performance entry of the base screened connector con nector and surge arrester exceeds
•Excellent TOV performance system RSTI designed for system CENELEC HD 629.1 S2 requirements,
•Maintenance free voltage up to 41 kV. which includes BS, VDE and other
international specifications.
The insulation of the screened surge
arrester is made of a highly modified Easily accessible rear plug with
silicone rubber characterised by high capacitive test point.
tracking resistance, elongation at
break and non-flammability. Few accessories required for system
test and earth connection.
A thin walled screen is permanently
bonded onto the insulation and Complete kit including screened surge
protects the connection system arrester, threaded pin and ground lead
Applications against unintentional contact. for three phases facilitates installation
and storage.
Single connection Parallel connection
